brand.name: ResearchMind AI
brand.vibe: Cinematic, moody, technical, highly polished, premium (Inspired by Notion, Perplexity, Linear, Vercel).
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix technical precision with cinematic luxury.
Emotion First: The UI should feel like a powerful, quiet command center.
Content is King: Documents, citations, and AI insights take priority over decorative elements.
Negative Space: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) to give complex data room to breathe.
Contrast: Crisp 1px borders against soft dark gradients.

tailwind_classes.glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-slate-50
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-slate-50

rules: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Never center headings by default; maintain structural left-alignment for dashboards.
Use mono font for citations, document IDs, metadata, and data metrics.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use Tailwind p-4, p-6, p-8 for cards. Use py-24 or py-32 for marketing sections.
layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid. Wide gaps (gap-8), massive asymmetry.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid. Dense gaps (gap-4). Col-span logic based on widget importance.
rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
Grid items must be direct children of grid containers.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-500 hover:bg-indigo-400 text-white rounded-md transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-slate-200 border border-white/10 rounded-md transition-all

cards.hover_effect: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-indigo-500/10 transition-all duration-300

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl backdrop-saturate-150 border-b border-white/10
navigation.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A] h-screen flex flex-col

forms.input: bg-slate-900 border border-white/10 rounded-md text-slate-100 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-slate-600
forms.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 mb-1.5 block

knowledge_graph.style: Canvas background transparent. Nodes use primary (indigo) and secondary (emerald) colors. Edges are white/20. Hovering a node highlights its connections and fades others.

ai_research_chat.user_bubble: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 text-slate-200
ai_research_chat.citations: Inline mono-font tags (e.g., [1], [2]) styling as small rounded badges (bg-indigo-500/20 text-indigo-300 hover:bg-indigo-500/40 cursor-pointer).

topic_clustering.style: Bento-grid cards representing topics. Use subtle radial gradients in the background of cards to denote volume/heat of the topic.

document_detail.layout: Two-column layout: Left (Document text/PDF view), Right (Extracted metadata, Entities, AI Chat).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Increase brightness of borders.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: Must have higher contrast. Use focus:ring-1 focus:ring-indigo-500.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

hero_background.description: 3D geometric nodes network. Use with a bg-black/70 overlay to ensure text readability.

texture_overlay.description: Dark glass/rain texture. Use as a fixed background with mix-blend-overlay and 10% opacity for atmospheric depth.

testimonial_avatar_1.description: Professional portrait for user avatars or testimonials.

rules: Hero image max overlay opacity: bg-black/60 to bg-black/80 for dark mode.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required libraries: lucide-react, framer-motion, react-force-graph-2d or react-force-graph-3d.
Apply data-testid to every button, input, and interactive link.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (dropdowns, dialogs), heavily styled to match the dark theme.
Marketing pages must use standard HTML/Tailwind for maximum layout flexibility (bento grids).
Ensure APCA contrast compliance, especially for dark mode text.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' or standard sans fallback if not available, ensuring tracking-tight.
